attributes.action: Get a full refund from France with penalties for failures to stop boats
attributes.additional_details: England and Ireland is over crowded with illegal immigrants.  Citizens can't get onto housing ladder as too many properties are snatched up for hmos.  People are struggling yet illegal immigrants get clothes,bed,meals and an offer of upto 40k to leave.  We are being taken for fools!  The prime minister should demand a full refund from France and deploy border force to turn any boats around.  There has been assaults, rapes and murders involving immigrants in hmos and hotels.
attributes.background: We believe u.k is being taken for a ride as France doesn't seem to be stopping any boats.  This in turn causes illegal immigrants to drain public fianances and get exit payments.  I believe getting money back from France plus penalties will kick start serious action and fine ngos assisting also.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
'End the 2023 £476m deal with France to stop the migrants crossing the channel'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760177

You may also be interested in these petitions:
'Seek to establish an audit with France on expenditure securing our borders'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749745
'End the one in one out migrant deal with France and detain illegal migrants'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750449
